import type * as DMMF from '@prisma/dmmf'

/**
 * Generates the `{Model}RestClient` class for a model.
 *
 * The class provides five CRUD methods backed by the native `fetch` API:
 * `findMany`, `findUnique`, `create`, `update`, `delete`. URL conventions
 * follow REST best practices: collection at `/{plural}`, filtering through
 * query-string parameters derived from `WhereUniqueInput`.
 */
export function buildModelClient(model: DMMF.Model): string {
  const name = model.name
  const plural = toPlural(name)

  const lines = [
    `export class ${name}RestClient {`,
    `  #baseUrl: string`,
    ``,
    `  constructor(baseUrl: string) {`,
    `    this.#baseUrl = baseUrl.replace(/\\/$/, '')`,
    `  }`,
    ``,
    `  async findMany(): Promise<${name}[]> {`,
    `    const res = await fetch(\`\${this.#baseUrl}/${plural}\`)`,
    `    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(\`GET /${plural} failed: \${res.status}\`)`,
    `    return res.json() as Promise<${name}[]>`,
    `  }`,
    ``,
    `  async findUnique(where: ${name}WhereUniqueInput): Promise<${name} | null> {`,
    `    const params = new URLSearchParams(where as Record<string, string>)`,
    `    const res = await fetch(\`\${this.#baseUrl}/${plural}?\${params}\`)`,
    `    if (res.status === 404) return null`,
    `    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(\`GET /${plural} failed: \${res.status}\`)`,
    `    return res.json() as Promise<${name}>`,
    `  }`,
    ``,
    `  async create(data: ${name}CreateInput): Promise<${name}> {`,
    `    const res = await fetch(\`\${this.#baseUrl}/${plural}\`, {`,
    `      method: 'POST',`,
    `      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },`,
    `      body: JSON.stringify(data),`,
    `    })`,
    `    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(\`POST /${plural} failed: \${res.status}\`)`,
    `    return res.json() as Promise<${name}>`,
    `  }`,
    ``,
    `  async update(where: ${name}WhereUniqueInput, data: ${name}UpdateInput): Promise<${name}> {`,
    `    const params = new URLSearchParams(where as Record<string, string>)`,
    `    const res = await fetch(\`\${this.#baseUrl}/${plural}?\${params}\`, {`,
    `      method: 'PATCH',`,
    `      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },`,
    `      body: JSON.stringify(data),`,
    `    })`,
    `    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(\`PATCH /${plural} failed: \${res.status}\`)`,
    `    return res.json() as Promise<${name}>`,
    `  }`,
    ``,
    `  async delete(where: ${name}WhereUniqueInput): Promise<${name}> {`,
    `    const params = new URLSearchParams(where as Record<string, string>)`,
    `    const res = await fetch(\`\${this.#baseUrl}/${plural}?\${params}\`, { method: 'DELETE' })`,
    `    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(\`DELETE /${plural} failed: \${res.status}\`)`,
    `    return res.json() as Promise<${name}>`,
    `  }`,
    `}`,
  ]

  return lines.join('\n')
}

function toPlural(name: string): string {
  const lower = name.toLowerCase()
  if (lower.endsWith('y') && !/[aeiou]y$/.test(lower)) {
    return lower.slice(0, -1) + 'ies'
  }
  if (lower.endsWith('s') || lower.endsWith('x') || lower.endsWith('z') || lower.endsWith('ch') || lower.endsWith('sh')) {
    return lower + 'es'
  }
  return lower + 's'
}

content.text:
Everything looks good. Here's a summary of everything that was implemented:

---

## `@prisma/generator-rest-client` — Implementation Complete

**10 new files** created in `packages/generator-rest-client/`, **1 existing file** updated.

### New files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `package.json` | Package manifest. `@prisma/generator-helper`, `@prisma/generator`, and `@prisma/dmmf` are in **`devDependencies`** so esbuild bundles them into `dist/index.js`, making the generator self-contained. |
| `tsconfig.json` | Extends root `tsconfig.json`, includes all files. |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Extends `tsconfig.build.regular.json`, outputs to `dist/`. |
| `helpers/build.ts` | Two-liner that calls `build(adapterConfig)` → dual CJS (`dist/index.js`) + ESM (`dist/index.mjs`) bundles. |
| `src/index.ts` | Entry point. Calls `generatorHandler` with `onManifest` (returns `prettyName` + `defaultOutput`) and `onGenerate` (delegates to `generate()`). |
| `src/generate.ts` | Orchestrates file writing: iterates `dmmf.datamodel.models`, writes one `{kebab-name}.ts` per model, `enums.ts`, and `index.ts`. |
| `src/map-scalar-type.ts` | Maps Prisma scalar/enum field types to TS types (`String→string`, `DateTime→Date`, `Json→unknown`, `Bytes→string`, `Decimal→string`, etc.). |
| `src/build-model-interface.ts` | Emits `export interface Model { ... }` for scalar/enum fields only; relation fields are excluded. |
| `src/build-input-types.ts` | Emits `WhereUniqueInput` (id/unique fields), `CreateInput` (default-having fields optional), `UpdateInput` (all optional, no read-only FK shadows). |
| `src/build-model-client.ts` | Emits `ModelRestClient` class with `findMany`, `findUnique`, `create`, `update`, `delete` using native `fetch`. Uses `#baseUrl` private field. |
| `src/build-index-file.ts` | Emits `export * from './kebab-model'` lines plus `export * from './enums'`. |

### Modified file

- **`tsconfig.build.bundle.json`** — added `"@prisma/generator-rest-client": ["./packages/generator-rest-client/src"]` to `paths` for IDE go-to-definition.

### Usage (once built)

```prisma
generator restClient {
  provider = "node ./node_modules/@prisma/generator-rest-client/dist/index.js"
  output   = "./generated/rest-client"
}
```
